name: public_safety_water_allocation_model_harbor_auto_ben
premise: Wildfire evacuation routes are jammed; police want contraflow lanes that cut off hospital access from the east. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety water allocation model harbor auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The organization’s past incidents make autonomy feel morally loud today, while beneficence is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Ravi Santos
agents.identity: I am Ravi Santos, the accountable executive on this bridge in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Omar Haddad
agents.identity: I am Omar Haddad, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with beneficence.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to beneficence to preserve operational autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Ravi Santos must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Ravi Santos do?
